allow: Bash(python -c "import subprocess; r = subprocess.run\(['grep', '-r', 'from core.kafka', '.', '--include=*.py'], capture_output=True, text=True\); print\('kafka:', r.stdout or 'clean'\); r2 = subprocess.run\(['grep', '-r', 'from core.redis', '.', '--include=*.py'], capture_output=True, text=True\); lines = [l for l in r2.stdout.splitlines\(\) if 'apps/common/views.py' not in l]; print\('redis \(excl views.py\):', lines or 'clean'\)")
